claim: 90% of YC 2026 AI startups focus on workflow automation, not AI features in existing apps
actionable: Build AI products around complete workflows (intake->decision->action->audit) not single-feature additions
source_title: I analyzed 373 AI startups selected by Y Combinator in 2026 (Build these with AI)

claim: Successful AI startups move from text generation to action systems (decision + execution)
actionable: Design AI products to complete work end-to-end (execute actions, update systems) rather than suggest
source_title: I analyzed 373 AI startups selected by Y Combinator in 2026 (Build these with AI)

claim: Action-taking AI agents require guardrails: permissions, approvals, audit logs, sandboxing, rollback
actionable: Implement permission checking, approval workflows, audit trails before deploying agent actions on real systems
source_title: I analyzed 373 AI startups selected by Y Combinator in 2026 (Build these with AI)

claim: Trust-heavy regulated industries (legal, healthcare, finance) require AI to show evidence, audit trails, approvals
actionable: Build compliance-first AI systems showing what changed, why, what evidence was used, who approved
source_title: I analyzed 373 AI startups selected by Y Combinator in 2026 (Build these with AI)

claim: Coding agents now handle complete software delivery: tickets->code->test->CI fixes->PR merging
actionable: Design coding agents to handle end-to-end ticket resolution including CI failures and code review feedback
source_title: I analyzed 373 AI startups selected by Y Combinator in 2026 (Build these with AI)

claim: Vertical SaaS disguising agentic OS patterns: pick painful workflow, expand to all decision/approval/update points
actionable: Start with single painful workflow, expand agent access to all data sources, decision points, and update systems
source_title: I analyzed 373 AI startups selected by Y Combinator in 2026 (Build these with AI)

claim: 1-3 person teams can serve large markets by delegating specialized tasks to AI agents
actionable: Build 1-person AI businesses by automating research, delivery, support, billing using specialized agents
source_title: I analyzed 373 AI startups selected by Y Combinator in 2026 (Build these with AI)
